market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to our wonderful entire home, perfectly suited for 4 guests. With a unique blend of nature and fun, this property offers a one-of-a-kind experience. Please note that we don't have any listed amenities, but our home is ready for your arrival.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be of the living room or a notable outdoor feature, showcasing the best of the property to potential guests.
key_diagnosis: The nightly rate of £336.4 is +92% higher than the cohort median of £175.00, potentially impacting occupancy
The occupancy rate of 20.7% is lower than the cohort median of 28.3%, indicating room for improvement
With 27 reviews and a rating of 4.81, there is an opportunity to leverage this positive feedback to attract more guests
analysis.outreach_hook: With a nightly rate £161.4 above the local median and an occupancy rate 7.6% below the median, there's a significant opportunity to optimize your listing for more bookings
